name: Pro Medicus Limited
analysis: PME has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 50% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$166.5650, stop A$153.6975, target A$194.3136 (2.16:1) — then trail it.
